title: my first time in hong kong 🇭🇰 solo travel, every thing i ate, things to do & exploring a NEW city
description:
I have been using the Medicube Booster Pro for almost a year now (scroll through my videos to see it appear super often!) and they finally came out with a more affordable and compact option. If you’d like to shop their March sale; links are below ❤️

Mini Booster Pro: https://amzn.to/3DyIlMI
PDRN Serum: https://amzn.to/4iiYYuT
PDRN Gel Mask: https://amzn.to/4ilEce9

Hello Friends!

we are in HONG KONG on our FIRST EVER solo trip rahhhh. this has honestly been so fun but, slightly nerve-wracking
